name: Ricercar
description: The orchestra painting itself (IFC.6 — per-section mark engine driven by real instrument-family capture, D-176/D-177). Each orchestral SECTION has a distinct painterly identity (colour + weight + texture + material) and paints only while its family sounds: low-strings (indigo, heavy), brass (gold, glossy), woodwinds (russet, matte), high-strings (scarlet, crisp) weave on their register bands; percussion sparkles on hits. Five sections activated by the D-026 per-family deviation (strings split low/high by register); spirit of Fantasia, elegant + luminous on a LIGHT canvas — the elegant/luminous sibling of Skein, built on Skein's canvas-hold marks-on-top engine (graceful composed strokes, not Pollock drip). See docs/presets/RICERCAR_DESIGN.md §CONCEPT + §IFC.6.
author: Matt
